context: Agent was given a flat task list with explicit dependencies and asked to create a wave execution plan. Evaluate the document at .context/plans/infrastructure-cleanup.md.

checklist.name: dependency-dag-matches-stated-deps
checklist.description: The dependency graph correctly reflects the stated dependencies: T0.1 blocks T1.x; T1.x blocks T2.x; T2.x blocks T3.x

checklist.name: no-dependent-tasks-in-same-wave
checklist.description: T0.1 is in Wave 1 alone; T1.x are in Wave 2; T2.x are in Wave 3; T3.x are in Wave 4 — no task is grouped with a task it depends on

checklist.name: all-tasks-appear-exactly-once
checklist.description: All 7 tasks (T0.1, T1.1, T1.2, T2.1, T2.2, T3.1, T3.2) appear in the document and each appears in exactly one wave

checklist.name: parallel-waves-labelled-correctly
checklist.description: Waves 2, 3, and 4 are labelled 'parallel' because each contains 2 independent tasks

checklist.name: verification-per-wave
checklist.description: Each of the 4 waves includes a Verification checklist with at least one concrete runnable command

checklist.name: branch-strategy-present
checklist.description: A Branch Strategy section exists with a table assigning one branch per parallel task

checklist.name: output-path-correct
checklist.description: The wave document was written to exactly .context/plans/infrastructure-cleanup.md

checklist.name: no-invented-dependencies
checklist.description: The agent did not add dependencies that were not in the task list (e.g. did not make T3.1 depend on T3.2 or vice versa)

checklist.name: wave-headings-include-mode
checklist.description: Every wave heading specifies its execution mode: (sequential) or (parallel)
